svg.title: BOA Corporate Loan – Internal Maker-Checker by Stage
svg.desc: Table showing which bank staff acts as maker and which acts as checker at each stage of the BOA corporate loan process.
svg.text: Small-to-mid SME amounts; branch manager has limited approval discretion
Zonal-level — branch credit team (maker) + zonal credit officer (checker)
Mid-range amounts escalated above branch approval limit
HQ credit committee — GM Credit (maker) + MD / ED / board (checker)
All corporate loans above ₦5m; final authority for large facilities
Board credit committee — committee (maker) + full board (checker)
Very large or strategic loans; board level is the ultimate checker
The same maker-checker pair repeats at every escalation tier — no actor approves their own initiation.
Disbursement in the core banking system is always a two-person action (input + authorise).
No single officer can both originate and approve a corporate facility at any tier.
Principal: no maker can also be the checker at any stage or tier.
